nasb.text: Praise the Lord! For it is good to sing praises to our God; For it is pleasant and praise is becoming.

esv.text: Praise the Lord! For it is good to sing praises to our God; for it is pleasant, and a song of praise is fitting.

cnv.text: 你們要讚美耶和華。 歌頌我們的　神，這是多麼美善， 讚美他，這是美好的，是合宜的。

ccb.text: 你们要赞美耶和华！ 歌颂我们的上帝，真是美好！ 赞美祂，真是快乐合宜！

csbs.text: 哈利路亚！ 歌颂我们的神，多么美好； 赞美他，多么美妙合宜！
